{{Quote|We know where she stands. Did not her bondedmate Han Solo fire on a peaceable protest at the Clans Building on Bothawui?|Shibatthi regarding [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
'''Shibatthi''' was a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who served circa [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. During the [[Caamas Document Crisis]], Shibatthi took an anti-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] stance.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
